mapper.sql: select batch_id, task_id, batch_name, source_type, source_name, source_record_id, responsible_unit_id, responsible_unit_name, region_code, region_name, period_type, period_year, period_quarter, period_month, period_key, batch_status, submit_by, submit_time, audit_by, audit_time, audit_opinion, item_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_fusion_collection_batch
mapper.select: select item_id, batch_id, indicator_id, indicator_name, indicator_code, raw_value, value_decimal, value_text, value_date, validation_status, validation_message, is_current, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_fusion_collection_item where batch_id = #{batchId} and del_flag = '0' order by item_id

select log_id, batch_id, from_status, to_status, action_name, audit_by, audit_time, audit_opinion, create_by, create_time, remark from nc_fusion_collection_audit_log where batch_id = #{batchId} order by audit_time, log_id
mapper.insert: insert into nc_fusion_collection_batch (task_id, batch_name, source_type, source_name, source_record_id, responsible_unit_id, responsible_unit_name, region_code, region_name, period_type, period_year, period_quarter, period_month, period_key, batch_status, submit_by, submit_time, item_count, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{taskId}, #{batchName}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{responsibleUnitId}, #{responsibleUnitName}, #{regionCode}, #{regionName}, #{periodType}, #{periodYear}, #{periodQuarter}, #{periodMonth}, #{periodKey}, #{batchStatus}, #{submitBy}, #{submitTime}, #{itemCount}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_fusion_collection_item (batch_id, indicator_id, indicator_name, indicator_code, raw_value, value_decimal, value_text, value_date, validation_status, validation_message, is_current, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{batchId}, #{indicatorId}, #{indicatorName}, #{indicatorCode}, #{rawValue}, #{valueDecimal}, #{valueText}, #{valueDate}, #{validationStatus}, #{validationMessage}, #{isCurrent}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into nc_fusion_collection_audit_log (batch_id, from_status, to_status, action_name, audit_by, audit_time, audit_opinion, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{batchId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actionName}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditOpinion}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select batch_status as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_fusion_collection_batch where del_flag = '0' group by batch_status order by batch_status
